title: Aizopsis litoralis
intro: Aizopsis litoralis, also known as Sea Rock Lily, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family, characterized by its beautiful white or pink flowers and succulent leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which may help boost the immune system and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The bioactive constituents of Aizopsis litoralis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Aizopsis litoralis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, as well as being used in the form of a tincture or salve, to treat a range of health conditions.
